mapper.insert:
insert into his_inpatient_charge_mirror ( id, tenant_id, fetch_batch_id, his_inpatient_charge_id, his_inpatient_charge_id_tf, patient_id, patient_name, inpatient_no, dept_code, dept_name, doctor_id, doctor_name, charge_item_id, item_name, spec_model, batch_no, expire_date, use_date, charge_date, quantity, unit_price, total_amount, charge_operator, remark, row_fingerprint, process_status, create_by, create_time ) values
(#{e.id}, #{e.tenantId}, #{e.fetchBatchId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeId}, #{e.hisInpatientChargeIdTf}, #{e.patientId}, #{e.patientName}, #{e.inpatientNo}, #{e.deptCode}, #{e.deptName}, #{e.doctorId}, #{e.doctorName}, #{e.chargeItemId}, #{e.itemName}, #{e.specModel}, #{e.batchNo}, #{e.expireDate}, #{e.useDate}, #{e.chargeDate}, #{e.quantity}, #{e.unitPrice}, #{e.totalAmount}, #{e.chargeOperator}, #{e.remark}, #{e.rowFingerprint}, #{e.processStatus}, #{e.createBy}, #{e.createTime})
mapper.select:
select m.*, ifnull(gzq.stock_qty, 0) as high_value_stock_qty, ifnull(lzq.stock_qty, 0) as low_value_stock_qty, cim.value_level as value_level from his_inpatient_charge_mirror m left join ( select d.tenant_id as tenant_id, trim(d.his_id) as his_dept_code, trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) as his_charge_item_id, sum(ifnull(gdi.qty, 0)) as stock_qty from gz_dep_inventory gdi join fd_department d on d.id = gdi.department_id and d.tenant_id = gdi.tenant_id and (d.del_flag = 0 or d.del_flag is null) join fd_material fm on fm.id = gdi.material_id and fm.tenant_id = gdi.tenant_id and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) where (gdi.del_flag = 0 or gdi.del_flag is null) and d.his_id is not null and trim(d.his_id) != '' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' group by d.tenant_id, trim(d.his_id), trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) ) gzq on gzq.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and gzq.his_dept_code = trim(m.dept_code) and gzq.his_charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) left join ( select d.tenant_id as tenant_id, trim(d.his_id) as his_dept_code, trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) as his_charge_item_id, sum(ifnull(sdi.qty, 0)) as stock_qty from stk_dep_inventory sdi join fd_department d on d.id = sdi.department_id and d.tenant_id = sdi.tenant_id and (d.del_flag = 0 or d.del_flag is null) join fd_material fm on fm.id = sdi.material_id and fm.tenant_id = sdi.tenant_id and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) where (sdi.del_flag = 0 or sdi.del_flag is null) and d.his_id is not null and trim(d.his_id) != '' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' group by d.tenant_id, trim(d.his_id), trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) ) lzq on lzq.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and lzq.his_dept_code = trim(m.dept_code) and lzq.his_charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and trim(cim.charge_item_id) = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and m.patient_name like concat('%', #{patientName}, '%') and m.inpatient_no like concat('%', #{inpatientNo}, '%') and m.dept_name like concat('%', #{deptName}, '%') and m.charge_item_id = #{chargeItemId} and trim(ifnull(m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf,'')) = trim(#{hisInpatientChargeIdTf})
and exists ( select 1 from fd_department dsel where (dsel.del_flag = 0 or dsel.del_flag is null) and dsel.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and dsel.id = #{departmentId} and trim(dsel.his_id) = trim(m.dept_code) )
and m.process_status != 'PENDING_CONSUME'
and m.process_status = 'PENDING_CONSUME'
and m.charge_date >= #{beginChargeDate} and m.charge_date <= #{endChargeDate} and m.process_time >= #{beginProcessTime} and m.process_time <= #{endProcessTime} and trim(ifnull(cim.value_level,'')) = trim(#{valueLevel})
order by high_value_stock_qty
asc desc , m.charge_date desc, m.id desc
order by low_value_stock_qty
asc desc , m.charge_date desc, m.id desc
order by m.charge_date desc, m.id desc

select * from ( select m.id as id, 'INPATIENT' as visit_type, m.patient_name as patient_name, m.inpatient_no as inpatient_no, null as outpatient_no, m.inpatient_no as visit_no, m.dept_name as dept_name, null as clinic_name, m.dept_name as dept_display_name, m.charge_item_id as charge_item_id, m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf as charge_id_tf, m.item_name as item_name, m.spec_model as spec_model, m.charge_date as charge_date, m.quantity as quantity, m.total_amount as total_amount, m.process_status as process_status, m.process_type as process_type, m.process_time as process_time, m.process_by as process_by, m.create_time as create_time, ifnull(gzq.stock_qty, 0) as high_value_stock_qty, ifnull(lzq.stock_qty, 0) as low_value_stock_qty, cim.value_level as value_level from his_inpatient_charge_mirror m left join ( select d.tenant_id as tenant_id, trim(d.his_id) as his_dept_code, trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) as his_charge_item_id, sum(ifnull(gdi.qty, 0)) as stock_qty from gz_dep_inventory gdi join fd_department d on d.id = gdi.department_id and d.tenant_id = gdi.tenant_id and (d.del_flag = 0 or d.del_flag is null) join fd_material fm on fm.id = gdi.material_id and fm.tenant_id = gdi.tenant_id and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) where (gdi.del_flag = 0 or gdi.del_flag is null) and d.his_id is not null and trim(d.his_id) != '' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' group by d.tenant_id, trim(d.his_id), trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) ) gzq on gzq.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and gzq.his_dept_code = trim(m.dept_code) and gzq.his_charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) left join ( select d.tenant_id as tenant_id, trim(d.his_id) as his_dept_code, trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) as his_charge_item_id, sum(ifnull(sdi.qty, 0)) as stock_qty from stk_dep_inventory sdi join fd_department d on d.id = sdi.department_id and d.tenant_id = sdi.tenant_id and (d.del_flag = 0 or d.del_flag is null) join fd_material fm on fm.id = sdi.material_id and fm.tenant_id = sdi.tenant_id and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) where (sdi.del_flag = 0 or sdi.del_flag is null) and d.his_id is not null and trim(d.his_id) != '' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' group by d.tenant_id, trim(d.his_id), trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) ) lzq on lzq.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and lzq.his_dept_code = trim(m.dept_code) and lzq.his_charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and trim(cim.charge_item_id) = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and m.patient_name like concat('%', #{patientName}, '%') and m.inpatient_no like concat('%', #{visitNo}, '%') and m.charge_item_id = #{chargeItemId} and trim(ifnull(m.his_inpatient_charge_id_tf,'')) = trim(#{chargeIdTf})
and exists ( select 1 from fd_department dsel where (dsel.del_flag = 0 or dsel.del_flag is null) and dsel.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and dsel.id = #{departmentId} and trim(dsel.his_id) = trim(m.dept_code) )
and m.process_status != 'PENDING_CONSUME' and m.process_status = 'PENDING_CONSUME' and m.charge_date >= #{beginChargeDate} and m.charge_date <= #{endChargeDate} and m.process_time >= #{beginProcessTime} and m.process_time <= #{endProcessTime} and trim(ifnull(cim.value_level,'')) = trim(#{valueLevel})
and exists ( select 1 from fd_department dscope where (dscope.del_flag = 0 or dscope.del_flag is null) and dscope.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and trim(dscope.his_id) = trim(m.dept_code) and dscope.id in ( select distinct x.did from ( select cast(upd.dept_id as unsigned) as did from sb_user_permission_dept upd where upd.user_id = #{params.scopeDeptUserId} and ifnull(upd.del_flag, '0') = '0'
and upd.customer_id = #{params.scopeDeptCustomerId}
union select ud.department_id as did from sys_user_department ud where ud.user_id = #{params.scopeDeptUserId} and (ud.status = 0 or ud.status = '0' or ud.status is null) ) x where x.did is not null ) )
union all
select m.id as id, 'OUTPATIENT' as visit_type, m.patient_name as patient_name, null as inpatient_no, m.outpatient_no as outpatient_no, m.outpatient_no as visit_no, null as dept_name, m.clinic_name as clinic_name, m.clinic_name as dept_display_name, m.charge_item_id as charge_item_id, m.his_outpatient_charge_id_tf as charge_id_tf, m.item_name as item_name, m.spec_model as spec_model, as charge_date, m.quantity as quantity, m.total_amount as total_amount, m.process_status as process_status, m.process_type as process_type, m.process_time as process_time, m.process_by as process_by, m.create_time as create_time, ifnull(gzq.stock_qty, 0) as high_value_stock_qty, ifnull(lzq.stock_qty, 0) as low_value_stock_qty, cim.value_level as value_level from his_outpatient_charge_mirror m left join ( select d.tenant_id as tenant_id, trim(d.his_id) as his_dept_code, trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) as his_charge_item_id, sum(ifnull(gdi.qty, 0)) as stock_qty from gz_dep_inventory gdi join fd_department d on d.id = gdi.department_id and d.tenant_id = gdi.tenant_id and (d.del_flag = 0 or d.del_flag is null) join fd_material fm on fm.id = gdi.material_id and fm.tenant_id = gdi.tenant_id and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) where (gdi.del_flag = 0 or gdi.del_flag is null) and d.his_id is not null and trim(d.his_id) != '' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' group by d.tenant_id, trim(d.his_id), trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) ) gzq on gzq.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and gzq.his_dept_code = trim(m.clinic_code) and gzq.his_charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) left join ( select d.tenant_id as tenant_id, trim(d.his_id) as his_dept_code, trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) as his_charge_item_id, sum(ifnull(sdi.qty, 0)) as stock_qty from stk_dep_inventory sdi join fd_department d on d.id = sdi.department_id and d.tenant_id = sdi.tenant_id and (d.del_flag = 0 or d.del_flag is null) join fd_material fm on fm.id = sdi.material_id and fm.tenant_id = sdi.tenant_id and (fm.del_flag = 0 or fm.del_flag is null) where (sdi.del_flag = 0 or sdi.del_flag is null) and d.his_id is not null and trim(d.his_id) != '' and fm.his_charge_item_id is not null and trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) != '' group by d.tenant_id, trim(d.his_id), trim(fm.his_charge_item_id) ) lzq on lzq.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and lzq.his_dept_code = trim(m.clinic_code) and lzq.his_charge_item_id = trim(m.charge_item_id) left join his_charge_item_mirror cim on cim.tenant_id = m.tenant_id and trim(cim.charge_item_id) = trim(m.charge_item_id) and (cim.deleted_flag is null or cim.deleted_flag = 0) where m.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and m.patient_name like concat('%', #{patientName}, '%') and m.outpatient_no like concat('%', #{visitNo}, '%') and m.charge_item_id = #{chargeItemId} and trim(ifnull(m.his_outpatient_charge_id_tf,'')) = trim(#{chargeIdTf})
and exists ( select 1 from fd_department dsel where (dsel.del_flag = 0 or dsel.del_flag is null) and dsel.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and dsel.id = #{departmentId} and trim(dsel.his_id) = trim(m.clinic_code) )
and m.process_status != 'PENDING_CONSUME' and m.process_status = 'PENDING_CONSUME' and >= #{beginChargeDate} and <= #{endChargeDate} and m.process_time >= #{beginProcessTime} and m.process_time <= #{endProcessTime} and trim(ifnull(cim.value_level,'')) = trim(#{valueLevel})
and exists ( select 1 from fd_department dscope where (dscope.del_flag = 0 or dscope.del_flag is null) and dscope.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and trim(dscope.his_id) = trim(m.clinic_code) and dscope.id in ( select distinct x.did from ( select cast(upd.dept_id as unsigned) as did from sb_user_permission_dept upd where upd.user_id = #{params.scopeDeptUserId} and ifnull(upd.del_flag, '0') = '0'
and upd.customer_id = #{params.scopeDeptCustomerId}
union select ud.department_id as did from sys_user_department ud where ud.user_id = #{params.scopeDeptUserId} and (ud.status = 0 or ud.status = '0' or ud.status is null) ) x where x.did is not null ) )
) t
order by t.high_value_stock_qty ascdesc, t.charge_date desc, t.id desc
order by t.low_value_stock_qty ascdesc, t.charge_date desc, t.id desc
order by t.charge_date desc, t.id desc

select 'INPATIENT' as visitType, patient_name as patientName, inpatient_no as visitNo, ifnull(dept_name,'') as deptName, count(*) as lineCount, ifnull(sum(total_amount),0) as sumAmount from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and date(charge_date) >= date(#{beginChargeDate}) and date(charge_date) <= date(#{endChargeDate}) group by patient_name, inpatient_no, ifnull(dept_name,'') order by sumAmount desc
select * from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and fetch_batch_id = #{fetchBatchId} and process_status = 'PENDING_CONSUME' order by charge_date asc, id asc
mapper.update: update his_inpatient_charge_mirror set process_status = #{processStatus}, process_type = #{processType}, process_time = #{processTime}, process_by = #{processBy}, update_time = now() where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id in #{rid}
mapper.select: select * from his_inpatient_charge_mirror where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id} limit 1
